required_local_proof: `npx playwright test tests/production/smoke.spec.ts --config playwright.prod.config.ts --grep 'locked /start CTA copy stays "Get started free"'`; `npm run build`; `npm run health`
required_browser_proof: Trigger or observe fresh current-main runs for the touched scheduled workflows and confirm the hosted proof goes green with the updated monitor semantics/runtime.
browser_proof_command: Done means: Production E2E and Weekly Production Audit use non-deprecated artifact actions, Production E2E still proves the locked /start CTA contract, and fresh hosted current-main runs are green.
anti_regression_checks: Production E2E still proves the locked /start CTA contract through the landing /start links, not generic page text.
Scheduled workflows stop using upload-artifact@v4 in the touched cron lanes.
Workflow comments and logs still say exactly what success means.
next_command: Run the scheduled-check reliability seam only. Allowed: .github/workflows/production-e2e.yml | .github/workflows/weekly-audit.yml | tests/production/smoke.spec.ts | ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md | SESSION_HISTORY.md | .foldera-contract.json. Local proof: focused production smoke grep + build + health. Hosted proof: fresh current-main runs for Production E2E and Weekly Production Audit.
